title: First Steps
description: This plugin adds newbie protection to new players!
body:
### **First Steps**

## Features
- Newbie protection (PvP off for new players)
- Players and Admins commands
- Permissions
- Newbieprotection timer
- Fully configurable
- Low server impact

##   Commands
### Admins
- /firststeps <on/off/reload>

### Players
- /newbieprotection <on/info>

## Config

> enabled: true

> protection-time: 600 # seconds (0 = infinite)

> messages:
  
> join-protected: "&aYou are protected as a new player!"
  
> protection-ended: "&cYour newbie protection has ended."
  
> protection-disabled: "&eYou have disabled newbie protection."
  
> protection-info: "&aNewbie protection time left: &e{time}s"
